preview.summary: Paraguay's compact, counter-attacking side meet a resilient Australia in a Group D finale that could shape qualification. Both favor structure and physicality over possession, so transitions, set pieces and game management are likely to decide it.
preview.homeForm: Paraguay returned to the World Cup after three absences, finishing sixth in CONMEBOL with statement wins over Brazil and Argentina, ranked around 40th-48th.
preview.awayForm: Australia qualified for a sixth straight finals, finishing second in their AFC group behind Japan, ranked around 27th.
preview.homeKey: Antonio Sanabria, Paraguay's leading qualifying scorer up front.
preview.awayKey: Mathew Ryan, captain and goalkeeper appearing at his fourth World Cup.
storylines: A potential decider with Group D places on the line
Paraguay's gritty revival under Gustavo Alfaro
Australia's tournament pedigree against a rejuvenated Albirroja
preview.h2h: Australia have edged the recent meetings, including a 1-0 win in their last encounter.
